top_signals.title: Lagarde Says Central-Bank Credibility Is Key in New World Order
top_signals.summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde said that governments might be inclined to tighten their grip on monetary authorities and stressed that upholding central-bank independence is even more important in an increasingly challenging global order.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Nomura Raises Annual Profit Target 50% After Record Year
top_signals.summary: Nomura Holdings Inc. raised its profit targets following a year of record earnings, as Chief Executive Officer Kentaro Okuda pushes for stable growth.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
